description: Anchor lens for the Hebrew concept of emet (אמת) — truth as firmness, reliability, and faithfulness. Fundamentally distinct from grc_aletheia_v1 (truth as unconcealment/unveiling): aletheia is an epistemic event (the hidden becoming visible), emet is a relational property (a person, word, or act that can be trusted to hold). The cross-lang collapse in English — both render as 'truth' — is documented in ADR-0073a and is the original motivation for this split. Grounds in logos.emet.firmness via he-core-cog-002 post ADR-0073c:emet_firmness_split. Entry retains logos.aletheia.verity for cross-lang alignment; this lens pivots exclusively on logos.emet.firmness. Cognitive mode: truth-as-faithfulness.
